model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the input field for the username.
The input field has the text "type here...".
I need to find the center coordinates of this input field.

Looking at the image:
The input field is a rectangle with a dark gray background and a light gray border.
It's located in the upper middle part of the screen.
The text "Username:" is above it.
The input box itself spans from approximately x=251 to x=569 and y=372 to y=426.
The center would be roughly ( (251+569)/2, (372+426)/2 ) = (410, 399).

Let's refine the coordinates:
Top-left corner of the input field: (251, 372)
Bottom-right corner of the input field: (569, 426)
Center: (410, 399)
